channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Outside 137 Gloucester Avenue, 21st July
item.description:
The light is flickering at night - bulb most likely needs replacing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 77, Gloucester Avenue, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped flytipped rubbish, 21st July
item.description:
Please clear Asap as rats & foxes seen on rubbish dumped on council owned pavement Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29, Nunhead Green, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Unwanted Mattresses and Children's Toy Dumped on Pavement, 21st July
item.description:
Two large unwanted mattresses and a child's toy have been left dumped on the pavement. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waverley Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Toys Dumped on Pavement, 21st July
item.description:
A number of unwanted toys have been left dumped on the pavement outside number 34. Can the local team please clear them away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Durham Rise, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken Furniture Stuffed Behind Utility Cabinet, 21st July
item.description:
Broken furniture has been left stuffed behind and beside the utility cabinet. Can the local team please clear it away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Manthorp Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Tree Branch Dumped on Pavement, 21st July
item.description:
A large tree branch has been left dumped on the pavement. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Vicarage Park, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Furniture and Other Rubbish Dumped on Path, 21st July
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Vicarage Road, Plumstead

item.description:

item.title: Hazard Tape Covering Electrical Components Damaged, 21st July
item.description:
The hazard tape covering the electrical components has been damaged. Can it please be repaired / replaced ASAP as children often play in the area. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bramblebury Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
